tracks.rawText: 0:55Untitled Projectv5.5CoverRap trap psicodeloco with distorted syncopated bass, punchy kick/snare, and a dembow drum pattern driving the groove at a tense mid-tempo, Staccato synth plucks, high-pitched synth sirens, filtered piano loops, record scratches, and woodblock accents cut through male spoken-rap delivery, with glitchy edits and gritty low-end pressurePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:29Studio Selection (3) (1)v5.5CoverReggaeton and Latin Trap fusion at 95 BPM in G minor, The track features a heavy, distorted 808 bassline that slides between notes, paired with a classic dembow drum pattern consisting of a punchy kick and crisp, layered snares, A dark, atmospheric synth pad provides a harmonic wash in the background, while a repetitive, high-pitched staccato synth lead adds rhythmic tension, Male vocals are processed with heavy pitch correction and saturation, alternating between melodic rapping and rhythmic chanting, Occasional record scratches and riser sound effects punctuate transitions between sectionsPublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection (3) (1)
